This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] [optional] l2Pool2d float32 4D tensor options.padding
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test l2Pool2d float32 actual 284.8902587890625 should be close enough to expected 254.81358337402344 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 27n but got 1024429n
[FAIL] [optional] l2Pool2d float32 4D tensor options.dilations
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: Failed to execute 'build' on 'MLGraphBuilder': Pool2d in tflite doesn't support dilations."

  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test l2Pool2d float32 actual 4.242640495300293 should be close enough to expected 3 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 8n but got 4703158n
